## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration opportunities between Webflow and growthx.ai, focusing on AI-powered content generation and template libraries.](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webflow is launching a new AI-powered app generation product ("co-gen") and exploring template library expansion](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [growthx.ai has developed advanced AI workflows for content generation and technical documentation](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Both companies see significant market opportunity in helping businesses adapt to AI-driven search and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Potential collaboration areas: joint webinar, template library development, and AI-powered content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai Platform Overview

  - [Atlas: Internal platform with context-aware system for AI-powered content generation](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Improved deep researchers with fact-checkers using Exa.ai, Tably, and Perplexity](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GraphRag for better semantic understanding in knowledge graphs](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Agentic and deterministic workflows with evals and traceability as first-class primitives](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Framework built on TypeScript with tools for monitoring, inspection, and learning from interactions](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)

### Webflow's Recent Developments

  - [Launched cloud hosting in May](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [New app generation product ("co-gen") with integration into Webflow's component system](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1521.0)
  - [Ability to use Webflow as a headless CMS with API available on self-serve plans](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1267.0)
  - [Implemented SQLite for cloud customers, considering future database options](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

### AI-Driven Content Strategy

  - [Both companies recognize the growing importance of AI-enhanced content for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Discussed the need for businesses to adapt quickly to AI-driven search changes](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Potential for creating AI-readable content separate from human-facing websites](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Challenge of scaling high-quality content creation and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)

### Template Library Collaboration

  - [Webflow interested in expanding template offerings, particularly for app generation](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Discussed potential process for converting static sites into Webflow components](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Exploration of creating a library of pre-built, easily customizable templates](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Consideration of starter kits and community-driven template development](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Joint Webinar Planning

  - [Proposed 90-minute webinar featuring Rachel, Marcel, and Guy from growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3190.0)
  - [Topics to cover: SEO maturity model, platform considerations for AI readiness, content creation strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3269.0)
  - [Aim to provide actionable insights and budget planning guidance for businesses](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3291.0)

### Market Observations

  - [Rapid growth of AI-powered design tools (e.g., Lovable with 300,000 signups/week)](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=2870.0)
  - [Shift from "prompt to prototype" to "prompt to production" in web development](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=2544.0)
  - [Increasing importance of branded AI experiences and potential monetization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=2487.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with Kira to discuss template library development timeline and resources](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3477.0)
  - [Marcel to coordinate with Jason on adjusting the webinar date and planning](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3297.0)
  - [Rachel to start a separate Slack thread for the co-gen collaboration project](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
  - [Explore potential for growthx.ai to assist in bootstrapping Webflow's template library](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3459.0)
  - [Consider developing a calculator tool for businesses to estimate AI content strategy costs](https://fathom.video/share/ZLpEVUjRC-PhtN-uEErPeSsxxpLjFJdj?tab=summary&timestamp=3744.0)
